name: GitHub — TypeScript open PR count
goal:
Open https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/pulls and find the count of currently OPEN pull requests (the number shown in the 'Open' tab badge at the top of the PR list).

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY this key:
  - "open_count": the open PR count as an integer (e.g. 357, NOT a string, NOT "357 open")

Example correct output:
  {"open_count": 357}

This number is shown next to the word 'Open' in the tab bar. Do not return the closed PR count. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
